LocaleLayout.title: Maison Bleu Royale | Premium French bulldog breeding

nav.contactHint: Write to us — form on the home page

hero.titleLine2: raised like a member of the family.
hero.lead: At {name}, each puppy grows in the calm of our Quebec home — with demanding veterinary care, gentle socialization and full transparency. We do not sell a "product": together we welcome a life that will matter for fifteen years.
hero.trustBefore: Complete health file, personalized advice and support after arrival —
hero.trustEmphasis: because trust is built over time
hero.imageAlt: French bulldog, elegant portrait in soft light
hero.floatText: We limit our litters to a small number of families — to ensure follow-up, quality and peace of mind, from reservation to daily life with your companion.

reassurance.eyebrow: Your peace of mind, our priority
reassurance.title: Breeding the way you expect it: rigorous, human, transparent.
reassurance.healthText: Vet exams, vaccines, deworming and a complete file — every puppy leaves with a clear, up-to-date history.
reassurance.socialText: Family routines, everyday sounds and gentle contact for balanced, confident puppies.
reassurance.beforeText: Interviews, tailored guidance and preparation for your home — no rush, with meaning.
reassurance.trustText: Honest photos, clear notes on temperament and lines. No unrealistic promises — trust is earned.

featuredPuppies.title: Puppies available
featuredPuppies.subtitle: Our featured puppies: highlighted for their profile and our quality standards. Every profile is honest; every photo shows the real dog.
featuredPuppies.empty: No featured puppies right now. Browse the full catalog or write to us.

upcomingLitters.title: Upcoming litters
upcomingLitters.subtitle: Announcements and pre-registration: each profile summarizes what is planned. For exact timing and availability, contact us or open the catalog filtered to “Upcoming litters”.
upcomingLitters.empty: No litter is announced right now. Write to us to be notified of future births.

canadianBreeds.title: Dog breeds most sought after by Canadians
canadianBreeds.intro: Families across Quebec and Canada often look for companions that are affectionate and suited to city life or home life. Several breeds regularly top popularity lists — including the French bulldog, prized for its gentle temperament and ideal size for apartments.
canadianBreeds.highlightText: Among the most sought-after breeds nationwide, the French bulldog stands out as a favourite: calm, sociable and deeply loyal. Our breeding program is built around this breed, with high standards and full transparency.
canadianBreeds.tagsTitle: Other breeds often popular in Canada

whyChoose.title: Why choose our breeding program
whyChoose.body: Because a puppy is not a fashion accessory: it is a life beside yours. We raise slowly, tenderly and with high standards — for French bulldogs healthy in body and mind, ready for a family that will love them as much as we have.
whyChoose.adv1: Limited litters and daily presence with mothers and puppies.
whyChoose.adv2: Direct dialogue with the breeders — never a call centre.
whyChoose.adv3: Clear contracts, documented health and follow-up after arrival.
whyChoose.adv4: An ethic of respect: we say no when the match is not right.
whyChoose.imageAlt: French bulldog puppy in a calm, bright setting

ctaMid.title: Ready to take the next step?
ctaMid.subtitle: The first step is often a simple message — we welcome you with listening and without judgement.

adoptionSteps.title: How to adopt your puppy
adoptionSteps.subtitle: Four simple steps, designed for your peace of mind and the puppy’s well-being.
adoptionSteps.step1Desc: Browse profiles, look at photos, read calmly. Descriptions are authentic.
adoptionSteps.step2Desc: Write to us: we answer personally, answer your questions and arrange a conversation.
adoptionSteps.step3Desc: Once we agree, a deposit secures your place — safely and transparently.
adoptionSteps.step4Desc: We guide you on supplies, food and the big day when they cross your threshold.

testimonials.title: Words that matter
testimonials.body: A representative selection of feedback: professionalism, puppy health and a lasting relationship of trust are what families mention most often.
testimonials.noteLang: These testimonials are shared in the language families originally wrote them in.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: How do I reserve a puppy?
faq.a1: Start by contacting us or filling out the form: together we check availability and fit. Then a deposit finalizes the reservation under our contract.
faq.q2: Do you offer follow-up after adoption?
faq.a2: Yes. We stay available for questions on diet, behaviour or health — you are never alone after arrival.
faq.a3: Each puppy leaves with a documented vaccination and deworming schedule. We explain dates and next steps with your veterinarian.
faq.q4: Can we visit or talk before reserving?
faq.a4: Absolutely. We favour honest exchanges — call, video visit or appointment, as suits everyone and the puppies’ welfare.
faq.a5: It depends on litters and the puppy chosen. From the outset we give a realistic range — no rushed promises, but a clear timeline.

contactStrip.title: A question? A crush on one of our puppies?
contactStrip.body: Write to us: we read every message with care. No cold auto-reply — only a team that understands how important this moment is.

contactFormSection.title: Write to us in detail
contactFormSection.body: For longer questions or special cases: secure form, personalized reply within a few business days.

pageAbout.title: About us
pageAbout.body:
Founded in 2010, Maison Bleu Royale is a family French bulldog kennel based in Quebec, Canada, organized around healthy, well-balanced puppies, rigorous health follow-up and clear guidance for every adopting family.

Our experience and professional practice. Since 2010, we have dedicated ourselves to the French bulldog with daily hands-on care on site: managing litters, observing behaviour, coordinating with our veterinary team and gradually preparing puppies for life in a home. That depth of experience helps us anticipate the needs of mothers and newborns, tailor socialization to each puppy’s temperament and answer future owners with accuracy — without rushing the process.

Grounded expertise and demanding standards. Our breeding decisions rest on breeding-dog selection, respect for breed type and appropriate health screening for the pedigree — not on maximizing volume. We deliberately keep fewer litters, allow proper rest between cycles for our females, and share factual information about each puppy’s status at the time of your inquiry or visit.

Transparency and a clear framework. Before any payment, we favour written communication and a contract that sets out each party’s responsibilities; the health file and paperwork provided at pickup complete this professional foundation.

This website is for general information only and does not replace your veterinarian’s advice.

pageBreeders.title: Our breeding dogs
pageBreeders.body:
Breeding dogs are chosen for temperament, breed type and relevant health screening. Details and documents are shared with seriously interested families, with respect for privacy and contract terms.

Visits may be scheduled by appointment where policy and regulations allow — contact us to arrange a conversation or a supervised visit.

We avoid over-breeding and prioritize the welfare of our dogs (rest between litters, veterinary care).

pageTerms.title: Terms of sale
pageTerms.body:
Purchase or reservation is documented in a written contract (identity of the puppy, price, payment terms and applicable legal notices in Quebec / Canada as relevant).

Any health guarantee is defined in that contract; it does not cover poor maintenance, accidents or lack of follow-up care after pickup.

Deposits secure the puppy under the terms shown on the profile and in writing. When in doubt, review before you pay.

This page is a summary — the signed contract and applicable law prevail.

pageDelivery.title: Delivery
pageDelivery.body:
Pickup on site is preferred, with paperwork (health, ID if applicable) and time with the breeder.

For distant families, transport options that protect welfare can be planned together. Fees and responsibilities are agreed in advance.

Avoid unsafe or prolonged transport without preparation (water, breaks, temperature). For flights or long trips, plan with us and your vet if needed.

pageFaq.title: FAQ
pageFaq.body:
When can the puppy leave? Separation follows applicable minimum ages and our socialization goals.

Are puppies ID’d and vaccinated? You receive records for what was done on our side; your vet continues the protocol.

Can I visit before reserving? Visits depend on biosecurity and policy — message us for options.

How does reservation work? You send a request from the puppy page by email; we reply and any deposit is agreed in writing and in the contract, not as immediate payment on this website.

More questions? Use Contact or the form at the bottom of the home page.

pageReservation.title: Reservation & deposit
pageReservation.body:
For puppies shown as available, the profile includes a form: your request is emailed to the kennel (through our mail setup).

We reply to confirm availability, the framework and, when relevant, the amount and terms of a deposit — everything is then confirmed in writing and by contract, not via immediate payment on this website.

For upcoming litters or price-on-request puppies, the same idea applies: message from the profile, then follow up with the team.

Keep copies of your messages; if the form fails, reach us from the Contact page.
